title: Crumbl Crusted Crusty Bread
description: A simple yet delicious way to elevate your crusty bread game. This crumbl crusted bread is perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Cut the crusty bread into 1-inch cubes.
In a bowl, mix together the crumbl and melted butter until well combined.
Add the cubed bread to the bowl and toss until the bread is evenly coated with the crumbl mixture.
Spread the bread mixture onto a baking sheet.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
